folio.label: 114r
folio.l: And softly to hire , rigút thus seide he
Mercy , and that ©e nougút bewreye me
For I am ded , if that thyngö be kydde
This purs , she witú Inne hire bosom , hidde
And went hire wey , ©e gete nomore of me
But vn to Ianuarie , a geyn comen is she
That oon his bedde syde , sat ful softe
And takitú hire , and kyssetú hire ful ofte

note.notetxt: 704double chek the dub against the MS.ODR

folio.l: And leid hi~ doun to slepe , and that a noon
She feyned hire , as thougú she must gon
There as ©e wote , that euäy wygút must nede
And whan she of this bille , hatú taken hede
She rent it al to peces , at the last
And in the preeue , softely it cast
¢ Who stodietú now , but fair fresshe May
A doun , by olde Ianuarie , she lay
That slepe , til the cougúe hatú hi~ waked
A noon he preyed hire , to strepen hire al naked
He wold of hire he seide , haue som plesaunce
And seide , hire clothes , dide hi~ combraunce
And she obeyetú hiö , be hire leef or lotú
But lest that päcious folk , be witú me wrotú
How that he wrougút , I dar nat to ©ow telle
Or wheither hire thougút yt , Paradys or helle
But heere I lete hem , werken in here wyse
Til Euene songö rongö , and that they must a ryse
Were it by destenye , or by auenture
Were it by enfluence , or by nature
Or constellaciou~ , that in swicú estate
The heuene stod , in that tyme fortunate
Was , for to putte a bille , of vxxxs werkes

note.notetxt: vxxxs727 stain on the word, dirt, not ink block.ODR

folio.l: For al thyngö hatú tyme , as seyn theise clerkes
To euäy wo~man , for to gete hire loue
I can nougút seye , but grete god a boue
That knowetú that noon acte , is causelees
He deme of alle , for I wol holde my pees
But sotú is this , how that this fressú May
Hatú take swicú impressiou~ , that day
Of pitee , of this syke Damyan
That fro hire hert , she ne dryue can
The remembrau~ce , for to don hiö eese
Certeyne thougút she , whom that this æingö displese
I rekke nougút , for heere I hiö assure
To loue hi~ best , of ony creature
Thougú he nomore had , than his sherte
Lo pitee rennetú sone , in gentil herte
